dealSummary: Vast, a Beijing-based 3D modeling specialist, secured a $200 million round led by Ince Capital and a VC fund backed by China Life Insurance at a $1 billion valuation.
leadInvestors: Ince Capital, a VC fund backed by China Life Insurance

dealSummary: Mecka AI, a startup collecting data on human motions and gestures for use in physical AI, raised a $25 million Series A and a $35 million follow-on investment, both led by Framework Ventures.
Munich-based battery storage startup Encosa raised a €25 million seed investment led by Realyze Ventures.
Dutch semiconductor specialist Invisix secured a €20 million seed round from investors including Hitachi Ventures, Transition Ventures and Imec.xpand.
Sekai, the developer of a platform to create small apps using text prompts, secured a $20 million Series A led by Khosla Ventures and Connect Ventures, Axios reported.
Veritas Aortic Solutions, a medtech startup focused on aortic diseases, raised a $12 million seed round.
